description_long: This is a modern rectangular desk with a clean, minimalist design, featuring a flat white tabletop supported by four cylindrical legs. On the desk sits a large flat-screen computer monitor with a white stand, a slim white keyboard, and a black rectangular mouse. To the left of the monitor, there is a sleek, angular black desk lamp with a square base and a thin, articulated arm. The desk surface is spacious and uncluttered, with all items neatly arranged. The materials appear to be primarily painted or laminated wood or engineered board for the desk, with plastic and metal components for the monitor, keyboard, mouse, and lamp. The overall appearance is functional and contemporary, suitable for a professional or home office environment.
description: A modern white desk with a large monitor, keyboard, mouse, and a black angular desk lamp, all neatly arranged on a clean tabletop.
description_view_0: Front view showing the monitor, keyboard, mouse, and lamp clearly arranged on the desk.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the monitor and the arrangement of objects on the tabletop.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the monitor and the lamp's structure, with less visibility of the keyboard and mouse.
description_view_3: Angled view from the opposite side, emphasizing the lamp's design and the monitor's depth.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the one with the monitor screen, keyboard, and mouse directly accessible, with the lamp positioned to the left; this is the functional front of the desk.
